title: Create: Simple Ore Doubling
description: Increase your ore yield with Create. Up to 3x return.
body:
About

Create: Simple Ore Doubling is a lightweight mod allowing for increased ore yield with Create.

In base Create, the only guaranteed double yield for ores like gold or iron requires a deepslate raw ore block processed into a pair of crushing wheels. For the rest, the best you can get is a 1.75 output on average.

With this mod, you get a guaranteed extra ingot for each raw ore processed into a mechanical press, and up to 3x return with a heated blaze burner.

This mod also adds Slag, an occasionnal byproduct of your ore processing that can be washed to retreive valuable items. Check the recipes below!

Media

 Doubling Netherite:

 Washing Slag:

Full recipe list

Show spoiler

Double Yield
- Any raw ore in a mechanical press with 50mb lava
- Outputs 2 crushed ores and has a 5% chance of producing Slag

Triple Yield
- Any raw ore in a heated mechanical press
- Outputs 3 crushed ores and has a 15% chance of producing Slag

Netherite Doubling
- 4x Netherite Scraps and 4x Gold Ingot in a superheated mechanical press
- Outputs 2 Netherite Ingots and has a 25% chance of producing Slag

Washing Slag
- Has a 7% chance of giving back any ore nugget and a 35% chance of producing x1 Experience Nugget

Compatibility

Show spoiler

Compatibility with Create: Ironworks

Compatibility with Create: Crafts & (More) Additions

Compatibility with Create: Molten Metals (1.20.1)

Dependencies

Only the base Create mod is required for this one to work.

JEI is recommended but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
